message:
feat(twitter): expand error handling and streaming capabilities

Improves the Twitter connector with better error categorization and
enhanced streaming support.

error.rs:
- Add comprehensive TwitterError enum with rate limiting, auth,
  network, and API-specific variants
- Implement Display and Error traits with descriptive messages
- Add error code extraction from API responses

client.rs:
- Add retry logic with exponential backoff for transient errors
- Improve rate limit handling with automatic backoff
- Add request/response logging for debugging

stream.rs:
- Enhance filtered stream connection with reconnection logic
- Add heartbeat monitoring to detect stale connections
- Improve tweet parsing with better field extraction
- Add stream metrics collection

lib.rs:
- Export new error types and streaming utilities
- Add feature flags for optional functionality

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
